provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, wiry human woman in her 40s with prematurely white hair and a twitchy trigger finger, wearing a stolen Compact flight suit with the name tag ripped off and replaced with a crude nickname patch, a modified flight harness with non-regulation additions including a concealed pistol holster at the chest, flight boots that actually fit because she stole them from a pilot her size, the flight suit has been re-dyed from Compact grey to a dark charcoal that does not quite match uniformly
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
